name: Nzoia Upper Basin Management
blocking_factor: Cross-county coordination — Nzoia crosses Trans Nzoia
column14: Upper Nzoia management plan has downstream implications for Budalangi. Multi-county MOU framework incomplete. Four counties involved.

name: Mount Elgon Catchment Reforestation
blocking_factor: Encroachment by smallholder farmers on forest boundary
column12: 000 ha reforested 2016-2021. Deforestation on private land adjacent to forest continues. Net catchment protection gain is modest.

name: Kitale Town Stormwater
notes: Design complete. County prioritised road works over drainage. Budget re-allocated 2021 and 2022.

name: Cherangany Hills Landslide-Flood Risk Mapping
notes: Risk map completed 2022. High-risk corridors identified. Not integrated into Trans Nzoia County planning approvals.
